blocker: Form requires honest answer to: 'Do you have at least 4 years of industry work experience (not counting internships)?' Jamie has 3 years. Truthful answer = No, which likely auto-rejects.
decision_for_jamie: OPTION A: Apply anyway, answer No honestly. Risk: auto-screened out by the 4yr filter.
OPTION B: Skip this one. Anthropic is high-value but 4yr gate is hard.
OPTION C: Find a referral / connect with Anthropic recruiter directly before applying (warm intro path).
recommended: C. Anthropic is a confirmed H1B sponsor and the role is a great scope match. A direct LinkedIn outreach to Anthropic Talent or People team naming the gap upfront has better odds than a cold app at 75% YOE.
files: cover_letter.pdf (1 page, candidly addresses YOE gap)
